description_long: This armchair features a compact, rounded silhouette with a gently curved backrest and armrests that seamlessly blend into the overall form. The upholstery is a light, solid color fabric with a subtle tufted pattern on the backrest, adding a touch of classic elegance. The seat cushion appears plush and inviting, with a slightly raised profile for comfort. The armrests are thick and padded, providing ample support for resting arms. The chair stands on four short, tapered legs made of dark wood or a similar material, giving it a stable and stylish base. Overall, the design is modern yet timeless, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A compact, light-colored armchair with tufted backrest, padded armrests, and dark tapered legs. The design is modern and inviting, with plush upholstery and a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted backrest, plush seat cushion, and padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the armrest thickness and the gentle curve of the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, rounded back and the dark tapered legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and seat profile.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, thick and rounded
attribute_backrest_style: medium height, rounded, tufted with button details
